scripts.dev: concurrently "cd ../web && npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.build: cd ../web && npm run build && cd ../desktop && electron-builder
scripts.build:linux: cd ../web && npm run build && cd ../desktop && electron-builder --linux
scripts.build:mac: cd ../web && npm run build && cd ../desktop && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:win: cd ../web && npm run build && cd ../desktop && electron-builder --win
